name: Runaan's Hurricane

passives.name: Wind's Fury
passives.effects: Basic attacks [[on-attack]] fire additional bolts at up to 2 enemies {{tt|in front of you|180{{degree}}}}, each dealing {{as|55% AD}} {{as|physical damage}}. Bolts apply {{tip|on-hit}} effects and are affected by {{tip|critical strike}} modifiers.

effects_structured.raw: Basic attacks fire additional bolts at up to 2 enemies in a 180-degree cone; each bolt deals 55% AD physical damage.
Bolts apply on-hit effects and are affected by critical strike modifiers.

simpleDescription: Ranged attacks fire two bolts at nearby enemies

schema_notes.effects_structured: Parsed from passive/active text for simulation use.
context_notes: Runaan's Hurricane is modeled as an attack-spread marksman item: each basic attack emits secondary bolts that inherit on-hit and critical strike modifier behavior.
